old_value: {"id":"seeds-77p","title":"Set up pre-commit hooks (ruff + pytest + beads integration)","description":"Install pre-commit hooks running: ruff lint check, ruff format check, full pytest suite. CRITICAL: beads already has core.hooksPath set to .beads/hooks/. Must integrate using the pattern from CLAUDE.md: (1) unset core.hooksPath, (2) symlink beads hooks from .beads/hooks/ into .git/hooks/ for post-checkout, post-merge, prepare-commit-msg, pre-push, (3) install pre-commit (uv run pre-commit install), (4) add beads as local hook in .pre-commit-config.yaml. Check sibling projects in /home/ryan/projects/outins/ for Ryan's preferred setup. old_value:
{"id":"seeds-5lh","title":"Typed relationships: models + DB layer (Phase 1)","description":"Build the foundation for typed relationships without touching CLI or export.

Models (src/seeds/models.py):
- Add RelationType enum (relates-to, questions, answers)
- Add Relationship dataclass (source_id, target_id, rel_type, created_at)
- Remove Question dataclass and QuestionStatus enum
- Remove related_to from Seed dataclass

DB (src/seeds/db.py):
- Add relationships table to schema, remove questions table and related_to column
- Add migration: create relationships table, populate from related_to JSON + questions table, drop old structures
- Add CRUD: create_relationship(), get_relationships(), delete_relationship()
- Add get_questions_for_seed() returning Seed objects via relationship query
- Update delete_seed() to cascade-delete relationships
- Update is_blocked(): blocked if unresolved children OR unresolved question-seeds
- Remove all Question CRUD methods
- Simplify FTS: remove question_texts column, drop question triggers, rebuild index

Tests:
- New TestRelationships class in test_db.py
- Rewrite question tests as relationship tests
- Migration test: pre-populated v1 DB produces correct relationships

See plans/question-migration.md for full context.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"aguynamedryan@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T15:29:14Z","created_by":"Ryan Duryea","updated_at":"2026-03-12T15:29:14Z"}

new_value: Implemented: RelationType enum, Relationship dataclass, relationships table + indexes, CRUD (create/get/delete), migration from related_to + questions, updated is_blocked + delete_seed cascade, 23 new tests, all 204 tests passing
{"status":"in_progress"}
old_value:
{"id":"seeds-cg9","title":"Typed relationships: CLI + export + web (Phase 2)","description":"Wire up the new DB layer to user-facing code.

CLI (src/seeds/cli.py):
- ask: creates seed (type=question) + questions relationship
- answer: sets seed.content = answer, status = RESOLVED
- questions: queries via relationship type
- show -q: displays question-seeds via relationships
- link: writes to relationships table, add --type option (default relates-to)
- tree: reads relationships from table
- doctor: update orphan check to use relationships

Export (src/seeds/export.py):
- Export: format_version: 2, relationships as outbound edges per seed, no embedded questions
- Import: detect format version, handle v1 and v2

Prime (src/seeds/prime.py):
- Update command descriptions

Web (src/seeds/web.py + templates):
- Read relationships from DB instead of seed.related_to
- Questions page queries question-type seeds

Tests:
- Update CLI command tests
- Add v1→v2 import test, update roundtrip tests

See plans/question-migration.md for full context.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"aguynamedryan@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T15:29:29Z","created_by":"Ryan Duryea","updated_at":"2026-03-12T15:29:29Z"}

new_value: Implemented: CLI (ask/answer/questions/link/show/tree/doctor/blocked all use relationships), export v2 format with v1 backward-compatible import, web templates updated, 209 tests passing
